name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Events
notes:
This Building Block triggers when a cryptocurrency mining file hash is observed.

Note: Populate the Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes Reference Set with relevant file hashes.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
db_fields_used: File Hash, SHA256 Hash, MD5 Hash, SHA1 Hash
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event matches 'File Hash' IS NOT NULL OR 'SHA256 Hash' IS NOT NULL OR 'MD5 Hash' IS NOT NULL OR 'SHA1 Hash' IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
when any of File Hash (custom), SHA256 Hash (custom), MD5 Hash (custom), SHA1 Hash (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event matches 'File Hash' IS NOT NULL OR 'SHA256 Hash' IS NOT NULL OR 'MD5 Hash' IS NOT NULL OR 'SHA1 Hash' IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
AND when any of File Hash (custom), SHA256 Hash (custom), MD5 Hash (custom), SHA1 Hash (custom) are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes - AlphaNumeric
